_purpose: External intelligence source for the Galaxy-DRE Intel Archive overlay.
_deploy_note: Place this file in the same directory as your galaxy HTML file.

sections.label: START HERE
sections.title: START HERE
sections.subtitle: New to the Galaxy? This is your entry point. Everything you need to begin.
sections.what: Galaxy-DRE is a privacy-first AI operating ecosystem built for builders, creators, founders, operators, and businesses that need to execute at a higher level without relying on fragmented software stacks or large teams. It combines planning, workflow architecture, development systems, debugging environments, execution infrastructure, privacy foundations, and supporting utilities into a single connected command environment.
sections.how: Galaxy-DRE is structured as a connected operational workflow designed to move users from planning to execution through a coordinated system environment. The primary entry point is DRE CS Interface, acting as the operational command layer. Projects then move into DRE Workflow to map execution systems, followed by DRE Code for active building. NWA and Debugger serve as the repair layer, while DRE Console provides an optional GTM execution environment. Supporting infrastructure like Andre Go runs alongside this core stack to maintain security without causing fragmentation.

paths.title: 1. THINK
paths.desc: Start in DRE CS Interface. Organize ideas, structure projects, diagnose problems, and establish direction before building.

paths.title: 2. DESIGN
paths.desc: Move to DRE Workflow. Visually design execution systems, logic structures, and project architecture in real time.

paths.title: 3. BUILD
paths.desc: Enter DRE Code. Actively build websites, applications, and tools using the workflow structure established earlier.

paths.title: 4. REPAIR
paths.desc: Use NWA & Debugger. Troubleshoot issues, resolve code problems, test systems, and stabilize builds.

paths.title: 5. EXECUTE
paths.desc: Deploy in DRE Console. Run GTM (Go-To-Market) operations, deployment workflows, and execution tracking.

paths.title: FOUNDATION
paths.desc: Run Andre Go alongside your stack for browser security, privacy protection, and AI conversation management.

sections.label: CORE SYSTEMS
sections.title: CORE SYSTEMS
sections.subtitle: Every active tool in the Galaxy-DRE ecosystem. Full intelligence on purpose, position, and usage.

entries.name: DRE CS Interface
entries.category: Core Execution Stack · Operational Command Layer
entries.purpose: Operational planning and system direction. Uses the Andre Method to organize ideas and diagnose problems before building.
entries.description: The primary entry point into the Galaxy-DRE operational ecosystem. DRE CS Interface acts as the command layer where you structure projects and establish direction. This is the 'THINK' stage of the workflow. It is NOT the same as Chat with DRE.
entries.best_for: Operators actively building in the ecosystem who need structured planning and direction.
entries.technical_details: Multi-provider: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek, Local (LM Studio / Element), Custom endpoint. Controller modes: DRE Default, Ford Technical, Book Writing. File attachments: PDF, JSON, TXT, Markdown.
entries.api_requirements: Requires your own API key from any supported provider. No key = no chat.
entries.privacy_notes: API key stored in browser localStorage only. Never transmitted to Galaxy-DRE.

entries.name: DRE Workflow
entries.category: Core Execution Stack · Visual Execution Architecture
entries.purpose: Visual workflow builder where execution systems, logic structures, and project architecture are mapped.
entries.description: The design layer of the ecosystem. After establishing direction in DRE CS Interface, move here to visually design your execution systems in real time. This is the 'DESIGN' stage. Companion (Architect) shows novice users what they're building.
entries.best_for: Anyone designing execution plans before building.
entries.workflow_position: Step 2 (DESIGN) — Map architecture after planning in DRE CS Interface.
entries.technical_details: Canvas-based node editor. Supports file and template uploads. Minimap for large flow navigation. AI generation via prompt input. Companion (Architect) for template-based projects.
entries.api_requirements: None required for basic workflow building. AI generation features require a provider key.
entries.privacy_notes: All data local. Workflows stored in browser.

entries.name: Dre Code
entries.purpose: The primary development and build environment where websites, applications, and tools are actively built.
entries.description: Your build environment. Move here once your execution structure is mapped in DRE Workflow. This is the 'BUILD' stage of the operational flow. AI-powered editor handles step-by-step building via the Agent Planner.
entries.best_for: Developers and creators actively building out mapped workflow architecture.
entries.workflow_position: Step 3 (BUILD) — Develop here after designing your execution structure.
entries.technical_details: AI-powered with Novice Guard Mode, Smart Code Search, Live Preview. Includes Agent Planner. Galaxy suite: DRE Code, DRE Companion (Architect), NWA, Debugger, Replicated.

entries.name: NWA / Debugger
entries.purpose: Troubleshoot issues, resolve code problems, test systems, and stabilize builds.
entries.description: The repair and optimization layer of the ecosystem. If issues appear during development in DRE Code, use these systems to stabilize your project. This is the 'REPAIR' stage. NWA handles general fixes; Debugger handles specific code errors.
entries.best_for: Anyone who has built something in DRE Code and needs to fix or test it.
entries.workflow_position: Step 4 (REPAIR) — Fix and test after or during the build phase.
entries.technical_details: Part of the DRE Galaxy suite. Works in conjunction with DRE Code output.

entries.name: DRE Console
entries.category: Core Execution Stack · GTM Execution Layer
entries.purpose: Optional GTM (Go-To-Market) execution layer for deployment workflows and tracking.
entries.description: The execution environment used when projects are ready for operational deployment. It is not the starting point, but the 'EXECUTE' stage of the workflow. Runs execution plans built in DRE Workflow step by step.
entries.best_for: Executing GTM workflows built in DRE Workflow.
entries.workflow_position: Step 5 (EXECUTE) — Optional operational rollout after the build is stable.
entries.technical_details: Multi-panel system: sidebar / workspace / AI panel. Orbits the CORE node as a gold spaceship.
entries.api_requirements: AI panel requires provider key for live assistance.

entries.name: Andre Go
entries.purpose: Browser security, privacy foundation, and AI conversation management.
entries.description: Andre Go is your security foundation. It operates alongside the core workflow, handling privacy setup, device security, and automatically capturing AI conversations across platforms.
entries.best_for: Establishing a secure browser environment before and during ecosystem operations.
entries.workflow_position: Foundation — Operates in the background supporting all layers.
entries.technical_details: Manifest V3 Chrome extension. Content scripts intercept DOM mutations on AI platform pages. All data stored in chrome.storage.local. No background server calls.
entries.api_requirements: Andre Cloud included (no key needed). Optional: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek, Grok via own API key.
entries.privacy_notes: 100% local. No data transmitted. No tracking.

entries.name: ZIP Tool
entries.purpose: Browser-native ZIP archiver and extractor. Zero server dependency.
entries.description: Drop files to compress. Drop a ZIP to extract. Zero server dependency, zero file upload, zero accounts.
entries.best_for: Anyone who needs to archive or extract files without trusting a third-party upload service.
entries.technical_details: Uses JSZip browser library. All processing client-side.
entries.privacy_notes: 100% local. Files never leave your device.

entries.name: DRE Extractor
entries.purpose: On-device audio extraction from any video or audio file. Outputs clean WAV. Zero server dependency.
entries.description: Drop any media file and DRE Extractor pulls the audio track and outputs a clean WAV. No uploads. No accounts.
entries.best_for: Content creators, podcasters, and researchers who need audio without cloud uploads.
entries.technical_details: Uses Web Audio API and browser-native decoding. Client-side only.

entries.name: DRE OS
entries.purpose: Browser and network exposure scanner. Scores your digital footprint and provides step-by-step hardening instructions.
entries.description: DRE OS scans browser signals, network metadata, and device fingerprinting vectors — then gives you a real exposure score with prioritized steps to reduce it.
entries.best_for: Anyone concerned about device tracking, digital privacy, or browser fingerprinting.
entries.workflow_position: Community/Support layer — run periodically as a health check.
entries.technical_details: Reads navigator, screen, canvas, WebGL, and network signals locally. No server calls.
entries.privacy_notes: Reads local signals only. Nothing is transmitted.

entries.name: Chat with DRE
entries.purpose: The website AI assistant that helps customers learn about the ecosystem and understand organizational offerings.
entries.description: Chat with DRE is the public-facing AI assistant for the Galaxy-DRE website. Helps customers navigate the ecosystem and learn about the tools. Powered by Andre Cloud — no API key required.
entries.best_for: New visitors, customers, and business operators learning about the ecosystem.
entries.workflow_position: Customer entry point — not part of the operator build flow.
entries.technical_details: Powered by Andre Cloud. No API key required.
entries.privacy_notes: Conversations handled by Andre Cloud provider.

entries.name: Orbit
entries.purpose: The social layer of the Galaxy-DRE ecosystem. Community updates, collaborator connections, and live ecosystem progress.
entries.description: Orbit is where the ecosystem meets the world. Community hub, live progress, collaborator network, and ecosystem news — all in one place.
entries.best_for: Staying connected with the DRE community, following ecosystem updates, and finding collaborators.
entries.workflow_position: Community perimeter — connects the ecosystem to the outside world.

entries.name: RePrizal AI
entries.purpose: LLM-powered resume builder with PDF import, AI reformatting pipeline, and polished export.
entries.description: Import your existing PDF resume. An LLM pipeline converts it to structured JSON. The builder renders a polished resume ready to export — without a monthly subscription.
entries.best_for: Job seekers who want AI-quality resume formatting without paying for a SaaS subscription.
entries.technical_details: PDF import via browser-native reader. AI JSON conversion via provider API.
entries.api_requirements: Requires API key (OpenAI or Anthropic recommended).
entries.privacy_notes: Resume data stays local. API key stored in browser only.

entries.name: Loan Shark
entries.purpose: Payday loan survival calculator. Maps exact reborrow sequences and exit strategies with cash flow timeline.
entries.description: Loan Shark calculates the exact sequence of payments and reborrows needed to survive your next payday — and the paydays after that. It maps danger zones and identifies exit windows.
entries.best_for: Anyone trapped in the payday loan cycle who needs a structured way out.
entries.technical_details: Pure calculation engine. Input income, bills, and active loans.

entries.name: 24 Hours
entries.purpose: Christ-centered daily rhythm app. Habits, bilateral focus sessions, urge resistance tracking, AI life coach, and evening reflection.
entries.description: 24 Hours is built for people who want structure, accountability, and a coach rooted in truth — not algorithms.
entries.best_for: Anyone building daily structure, fighting bad habits, or wanting a Christ-centered productivity system.
entries.technical_details: AI Coach supports OpenAI, Groq, DeepSeek, Anthropic. All data stored locally.
entries.api_requirements: AI Coach requires API key (OpenAI, Groq, DeepSeek, or Anthropic).
entries.privacy_notes: All data local. No tracking. No accounts.

entries.name: DRE Flow
entries.purpose: AI-powered manuscript analysis dashboard. Chapter summaries, character arc checking, timeline consistency, highlight analysis.
entries.description: DRE Flow is built for authors managing complex manuscripts. Upload your .docx or .txt and DRE Flow runs AI-driven chapter analysis, character thread mapping, and consistency checks.
entries.best_for: Fiction and non-fiction authors managing complex narratives or multi-timeline stories.
entries.workflow_position: Creative layer — connects to Kleara Studios universe.
entries.technical_details: Supports Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, and DeepSeek. File processing client-side.
entries.api_requirements: Requires API key from Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, or DeepSeek.
entries.privacy_notes: Manuscript stays local. API key stored in browser only.

entries.name: Kleara Studios
entries.purpose: Literary arm of the ecosystem. Two authors, two perspectives on the same world. Completely separate creative universe.
entries.description: DL Ford — Light / Exposure. People don't break. They decide. The DEFINED series. Atlas Parks — Dark / Pattern. The dark doesn't hide things. It reveals what light ignores. HADDER: Isabella Hadder.
entries.best_for: Readers interested in the DRE extended creative universe.
entries.workflow_position: Creative perimeter — separate from the tool ecosystem.
entries.technical_details: Rendered as a deep-space station node below the main galaxy.

sections.label: AI PROVIDERS
sections.title: AI PROVIDERS
sections.subtitle: All supported AI systems, their capabilities, and your responsibilities as the key holder.

providers.name: Andre Cloud
providers.desc: Built-in AI provider managed by the Andre ecosystem. Powers Chat with DRE and Andre Go premium features. No API key required — included with Andre Go premium.

providers.name: OpenAI
providers.desc: GPT-4o, GPT-4, and o-series models. Industry standard. Supported in DRE CS Interface, DRE Flow, RePrizal AI, and 24 Hours. Get your key at platform.openai.com.

providers.name: Anthropic Claude
providers.desc: Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Haiku, and Opus. Best for nuanced reasoning, long document analysis, and writing. Supported in DRE CS Interface, DRE Flow, and 24 Hours. Get your key at console.anthropic.com.

providers.name: Google Gemini
providers.desc: Gemini 1.5 Pro and Flash. Strong multimodal capabilities and speed. Supported in DRE CS Interface and 24 Hours. Get your key at aistudio.google.com.

providers.name: DeepSeek
providers.desc: Cost-effective alternative with strong coding and reasoning performance. Supported across DRE CS Interface and 24 Hours. Get your key at platform.deepseek.com.

providers.name: Groq
providers.desc: Ultra-fast inference via Groq LPU hardware. Used in 24 Hours for rapid AI coaching responses where speed matters. Get your key at console.groq.com.

providers.name: Local / LM Studio
providers.desc: Run models entirely on your own machine via LM Studio or any OpenAI-compatible local endpoint. Zero data leaves your device. Supported in DRE CS Interface via custom endpoint setting.

sections.label: WORKFLOW MAPS
sections.title: WORKFLOW MAPS
sections.subtitle: Execution paths for the Galaxy-DRE ecosystem. Each flow reflects how the tools connect for a specific goal.

flows.name: CORE OPERATIONAL STACK
flows.desc: The central spine of the Galaxy-DRE ecosystem. Think in CS Interface, Design in Workflow, Build in Code, Repair in NWA/Debugger, and optionally Execute GTM in Console.

flows.name: SUPPORT INFRASTRUCTURE
flows.desc: The foundational layer operating alongside your primary execution stack to establish security, privacy, and media extraction without cluttering the workflow.

flows.name: GTM EXECUTION
flows.desc: For Go-To-Market execution. Plan in DRE CS Interface, design the GTM flow in DRE Workflow, then run execution blocks step by step in DRE Console.

flows.name: DAILY SYSTEM
flows.desc: Start your morning rhythm in 24 Hours. Bring any project blockers or daily planning to DRE CS Interface. Design your day's execution plan in DRE Workflow.

flows.name: PRIVACY AUDIT
flows.desc: Run a full device exposure scan in DRE OS. Archive reports securely with ZIP Tool, all protected under the Andre Go browser foundation.

flows.name: MANUSCRIPT PIPELINE
flows.desc: Analyze manuscript structure in DRE Flow. Use DRE CS Interface for deep structural planning and revision direction. Publish and promote via Kleara Studios.

flows.name: FINANCIAL ESCAPE
flows.desc: Map your exact loan survival path in Loan Shark. Get strategic financial planning from Chat with DRE. Build a structured escape execution plan in DRE Workflow.

sections.label: ARCHITECTURE
sections.title: ARCHITECTURE
sections.subtitle: Engineering intelligence. System structure, protocols, and technical design decisions.

entries.title: SINGLE-FILE ARCHITECTURE
entries.body: Each tool in the ecosystem is a self-contained HTML file. No build system. No framework. No server required for local deployment. Deploy by dropping files in a directory. Maximum portability and zero dependency drift.

entries.title: LOCAL-FIRST DATA PROTOCOL
entries.body: All user data — sessions, API keys, conversation history, tool state — lives in browser localStorage or IndexedDB. No backend. No accounts required. No tracking by default. The user owns their data completely.

entries.title: THREE.JS RENDERING ENGINE
entries.body: The galaxy interface uses Three.js r160 for WebGL rendering. OrbitControls handle camera rotation, zoom, and damping. Nodes are SphereGeometry with MeshBasicMaterial for maximum mobile GPU performance. The spacecraft (DRE Console moon) uses MeshStandardMaterial with solar wing panels and animated engine plumes.

entries.title: MANIFEST V3 EXTENSION
entries.body: Andre Go runs as a Chrome Manifest V3 extension. Content scripts inject into AI platform pages and intercept DOM mutations via MutationObserver to capture messages in real time. All capture and storage is local-only using chrome.storage.local. Supports Chrome 114+, Edge 114+, and Brave.

entries.title: AI PROVIDER ABSTRACTION
entries.body: DRE CS Interface and compatible tools use a provider abstraction layer — the same chat pipeline routes to OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, DeepSeek, Groq, or local endpoints via a unified API wrapper. Controller modes (DRE Default, Ford Technical, Book Writing) inject different system prompts into the same pipeline.

entries.title: INTEL ARCHIVE FETCH ARCHITECTURE
entries.body: The Intel Archive loads intelligence from galaxy_master_knowledge.json via fetch() on first open. Response is cached in sessionStorage for 30 minutes. Cache key: ia_knowledge_v1. On cache miss or expiry, a fresh fetch is triggered automatically.

entries.title: ANALYTICS LAYER
entries.body: GA4 tracks anonymized page events — galaxy_entered, node_opened, tutorial_started, intel_archive_opened. A CounterAPI call increments total visit count server-side. All analytics are invisible to users. Admin overlay accessible via Shift+Alt+D.

entries.title: BRIDGE PROTOCOL
entries.body: Tools communicate via shared localStorage keys prefixed with dre_. DRE Workflow exports JSON execution plans consumable by DRE Console. DRE CS Interface can ingest any tool's output via file attachment. The shared context key dre_session holds cross-tool session metadata.

sections.label: FAQ
sections.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED
sections.subtitle: Quick-answer intelligence layer. Tap any question to expand.

items.a: Yes. All tools in the Galaxy-DRE ecosystem store data locally in your browser. Nothing is transmitted to Galaxy-DRE servers. API keys go directly to the AI provider you choose — we never see them.

Start in the DRE CS Interface to establish direction. Run Andre Go in the background as your privacy foundation. Follow the sequence: Think (Interface), Design (Workflow), Build (Code), Repair (Debugger).
Andre Go is a Chrome extension you save to your browser. It functions as your support infrastructure for privacy, device security, and captures AI conversations across 10+ platforms automatically.

items.q: What is the difference between Chat with DRE and DRE CS Interface?
items.a: Chat with DRE is a community system and website AI assistant for customers learning about the ecosystem. DRE CS Interface is the core operational stack tool for planning and building.

items.q: What is the difference between DRE Workflow and DRE Console?
items.a: DRE Workflow is the creation layer — you visually design execution plans using nodes. DRE Console is the GTM execution layer where you run those established plans step by step.

items.q: What is the DRE Galaxy suite?
items.a: The DRE Galaxy suite of tools includes: DRE Code (the editor), DRE Companion/Architect (template-based builder), NWA (general fix tool), Debugger (code error resolution), and Replicated.

items.q: Do I need an API key?
items.a: Not for everything. Andre Go and Chat with DRE use Andre Cloud. Core and Community systems like DRE CS Interface, DRE Flow, 24 Hours, and RePrizal AI require your own provider key.
Orbit is the social community layer of the galaxy connecting the ecosystem to the outside world for ecosystem updates, collaborator networks, and live progress.
Kleara Studios is the creative ecosystem perimeter. It holds a separate author universe featuring works by DL Ford (light/exposure) and Atlas Parks (dark/pattern).
Yes. The galaxy is built mobile-first with touch controls, pinch-to-zoom, tap-to-open, and reduced rendering load for mobile GPUs.

items.q: How do I use the INTEL button?
items.a: Click INTEL in the top-right corner of the galaxy, or press ? on your keyboard. The Intel Archive opens as a full-screen overlay with the complete ecosystem knowledge base.

items.q: What does the gold spaceship do?
items.a: The gold spaceship orbiting the core planet is DRE Console — your GTM execution layer. Click it to deploy and execute the operational plans designed in DRE Workflow.
